case_title: NAVY FEDERAL CREDIT UNION VS. CAMERON N. CARTER

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION PURSUANT TO 585 CCP IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100148040) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NAVY FEDERAL CREDIT UNION

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NAVY FEDERAL CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARTER, CAMERON N. $8,848.30 PRINCIPAL, $1,225.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $305.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,378.30, SEE SCANNED DOC
